style_presets.vintage-radio: vintage radio illustration, warm amber tones, retro microphone silhouette, subtle grain, centered composition, negative space at top and bottom for text overlay
style_presets.modern-minimal: modern minimalist cover, single bold geometric motif, deep brand color, negative space at top and bottom for text overlay
style_presets.neon-night: neon night cityscape silhouette, vibrant violet and cyan, single focal motif, negative space at top and bottom for text overlay
style_presets.paper-grain: warm paper grain background, single hand-drawn motif, muted duotone, negative space at top and bottom for text overlay

negative_prompt: text, letters, logo text, watermark, cluttered small details, tiny icons, thin outlines, photo of faces, photorealistic skin
positive_suffix: bold silhouette, recognizable at small size, centered motif, solid or simple gradient background
